summary:
ht, amber Body Fat %, green Muscle+Lean dual, purple stacked Body Comp, cyan Hydration dual-axis, pink BMI+Metabolic Age dual-axis, teal Custom
**Wired into the app shell:**
- `app.js` now calls `HealthAgent.bodyMap.init()` / `HealthAgent.bodyTrends.init()` on sub-tab activation
- `index.html` loads Chart.js CDN + both JS files
- `app.css` has ~240 lines of new CSS for stats bar, toggles, legend, SVG, segment cards, chart fullscreen, and responsive breakpoints
